summary: Tested 3 features: (1) Contact Provider from Marketplace - WORKING with expected behavior, (2) Auto-share Birth Plan UI - WORKING (notice present), (3) Invoices in Messages - CRITICAL BUG: pendingInvoices fetched but NOT RENDERED in UI

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: pendingInvoices state is fetched (line 85-96) and stored (line 64), but NEVER RENDERED in the JSX. The invoices section is completely missing from the UI.

action_items: ADD INVOICES RENDERING: In frontend/app/(mom)/messages.tsx, add JSX to render the pendingInvoices array. It should show invoice amount, description, and provider name above or below the conversations list.
Suggested location: After the header section (lines 246-259) and before the conversations list, add a 'Pending Invoices' section that maps over pendingInvoices
critical_code_review_comments: BUG CONFIRMED: messages.tsx line 64 declares pendingInvoices state, line 85-96 fetches invoices, line 162 calls fetchInvoices() on mount, BUT there is NO JSX to render the invoices anywhere in the component
Feature 1 (Contact Provider) works correctly - shows alert to share birth plan first if no connection exists, or navigates to messages if connection exists
Feature 2 (Auto-share Birth Plan) UI notice exists at lines 269-275 in birth-plan.tsx
Backend APIs all working: /api/mom/invoices returns correct data, /api/messages endpoints work, /api/birth-plan endpoints work

success_rate.frontend: 66% (2/3 features working, 1 has UI rendering bug)

seed_data_creation: None needed - existing test accounts used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature 3 (Invoices in Messages) requires UI code fix. The backend /api/mom/invoices endpoint works correctly. The fix is to add JSX rendering of pendingInvoices state in messages.tsx. Feature 1 and 2 are working correctly.

feature_1_contact_provider.details: Marketplace shows providers, clicking View Profile opens modal, Contact Provider button exists, clicking it shows 403 error if no connection (expected behavior per code), or navigates to messages if connection exists

feature_2_auto_share_birth_plan.details: Auto-share notice UI exists in birth-plan.tsx lines 269-275. Text 'Your birth plan is automatically shared with providers on your team when you save changes.' is present on page

feature_3_invoices_in_messages.details: Backend API works - /api/mom/invoices returns invoices correctly. Frontend bug: pendingInvoices state is defined (line 64), fetched (line 85-96), called on mount (line 162), but NO JSX renders this data. The UI shows only conversations, no invoice section exists.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Invoices not displayed on Messages page
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Missing JSX rendering code for pendingInvoices state in messages.tsx
reproduction_steps: 3. Observe: Only conversations are shown, no invoices section
rca_of_the_issue.fix_suggestion: Add a Pending Invoices section in messages.tsx JSX that maps over pendingInvoices array, showing invoice amount, description, status, and provider name
